title: SimulationRun
description: Schema for a single Hegselmann-Krause simulation run on a specific network instance.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this simulation run (UUID or hash).

network_id.description: Identifier of the network instance used (e.g., seed or filename).

N.description: Number of nodes in the network.

epsilon.description: Bounded confidence threshold parameter used in this run.

seed.description: Random seed used for initialization and simulation.

convergence_time.description: Number of iterations until convergence. Null if non-convergent.

final_epsilon_distance.description: Maximum change in opinion vector at the final step (or at max_iter).

temporal_trace.description: Full temporal trace of opinion vectors (N x T matrix flattened or list of lists).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the simulation completed.
